MINI MINUTES: Judge Ksenia Tsenin; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwendolyn Washington.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cardell Coleman is present.
Attorney Kevin M. Coles representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Nov-19-2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
